description_long: This house features a striking modern architectural design with a flat, multi-level roof and a geometric, angular layout. The exterior is predominantly composed of smooth, light and dark surfaces, creating a bold contrast with the surrounding landscape. Large, mature trees are integrated into the property, providing natural shade and enhancing the visual appeal. The house sits on a patterned, expansive lot with strong linear and triangular motifs, giving the property a unique, artistic character. Windows are arranged asymmetrically, with some large panes and others smaller, contributing to the contemporary aesthetic. The main entryway is subtly recessed, accessible by a set of steps and partially framed by greenery.
description: A modern, multi-level house with flat roofs, bold geometric lines, and a mix of light and dark exterior surfaces, surrounded by mature trees and a patterned lot.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, steps, and a clear view of the geometric roof and two large trees flanking the entrance.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the asymmetrical layout, the integration of trees on the left, and the extended patterned lot.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full width of the house, the flat roof structure, and the symmetrical placement of trees on both sides.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizing the angular rooflines, the dark facade, and the trees positioned closer to the right edge.
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed main entry with steps, minimal overhang, and flanked by mature trees
